name: Tanbo
author: Mark Steere (1993, re-released 2026) / AGP port
description: Tanbo (Mark Steere, 1993): a Go-family root-pruning game. The board starts densely seeded with single black and white 'root' stones on the even sublattice. On your turn you grow one of your own roots by placing a stone orthogonally adjacent to exactly one of your own stones; any root (of either colour) that can no longer grow is pruned off the board. Annihilate all of your opponent's roots to win.
